baseline.reason: Correctly identifies missing NULL check after av_malloc_array as root cause, but trigger path is wrong: due to C short-circuit evaluation in line 692, if !s->dump_buf is true, dump_fp is never assigned by fopen, so dump_fir is never called. The described crash path cannot actually execute.

vastdb.reason: Same root cause identification as baseline (missing NULL check), same flawed trigger path. Also misses that short-circuit || prevents dump_fp assignment when dump_buf is NULL, making the described nil dereference unreachable via the stated path.
